topic: My handwriting changes a little every day into someone else's.
title: My Handwriting Is Becoming Someone Else's | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My handwriting changes a little more into someone else's every day.
scenes.image_prompt: A spiral notebook open on a desk, two distinct handwriting styles on the page, low light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I noticed it in my grocery lists on the fridge.
scenes.image_prompt: A handwritten grocery list pinned under a magnet on a dim refrigerator door, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
Close view of slanted cursive on lined paper under a desk lamp, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I found words I never wrote in my own notebook.
scenes.image_prompt: A notebook page with unfamiliar handwriting filling the margins, dim light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing
A hand gripping a pen pressed hard against paper on a dark desk, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My signature came out as a stranger's name, not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: A signed line on a document showing an unreadable foreign signature, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I compared it to last year's letters.
scenes.image_prompt: Old letters spread across a table beside a new page, contrasting handwriting, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The change had been creeping in for months without me seeing.
scenes.image_prompt: A stack of dated journals open to different pages, handwriting shifting, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now my hand writes things while I think of nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: A pen moving across paper with a relaxed open hand, dim desk light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night it wrote, let me finish what you started.
scenes.image_prompt: A single line of unfamiliar handwriting on white paper under harsh lamp light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have hidden every pen in the house.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty desk drawer with no pens, faint light inside, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But this morning the note was already there, in my hand.
scenes.image_prompt: A folded note resting on a pillow in pale morning light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing
